title: Recruitment & Staffing Services in Vietnam
metaDescription: Recruitment and staffing services in Vietnam — executive search, flexible staffing and full HR support to help you scale with the right people at the right time.

hero.title: Recruitment & Staffing Services in Vietnam
hero.subtitle: Scale your business with the right people at the right time, through solutions tailored to Vietnam's talent market.

sections.heading: Find and onboard the right talent

items.title: Executive Search
items.desc: Discreet, focused hiring for senior leadership and specialised professionals.

items.title: Staffing Services
items.desc: Flexible temporary, project-based and full-time placements.

items.title: Comprehensive Support
items.desc: Labor contracts, payroll, social insurance reporting and payslip administration.

sections.heading: Why partner with us
items: Business-focused recruitment aligned with your growth objectives.
Deep knowledge of Vietnam's labor market dynamics.
Adaptable models for executive and large-scale hiring.
Integration with our broader HR, payroll and compliance services.

items.title: Understand your needs
items.desc: We align with your hiring goals and business objectives.

items.title: Develop a search strategy
items.desc: We design a targeted approach for the role.

items.title: Source & screen
items.desc: We source and screen candidates through specialised channels.

items.title: Coordinate interviews
items.desc: We arrange interviews and gather candidate feedback.

items.title: Close the hire
items.desc: We support the offer stage through to a successful hire.

items.q: What is the difference between executive search and mass recruitment?
items.a: Executive search is a discreet, focused process for senior and specialised roles, while staffing and mass recruitment provide flexible volume hiring for temporary, project-based or full-time needs.

items.q: Do you support foreign companies entering Vietnam?
items.a: Yes. We help new market entrants build their teams and integrate recruitment with HR, payroll and compliance support.
We recruit across a broad range of sectors, matching specialised talent to each industry's requirements.
Timelines depend on the complexity and seniority of the role; we set clear expectations at the start of each search.

sections.title: Build your team in Vietnam
sections.subtitle: Talk to our recruitment experts about your next hire.
